title: Stirring device for kitchen application
abstract: A stirring ball moved by an internal drive moves erratically on the bottom between the outer walls of a preparation vessel by means of an eccentric drive, thus mixing the ingredients of food and preventing caking.
claims: Claims 5 Claims 1. Stirring device for kitchen application, wherein one or more balls with internal movement device are moved in the material to be prepared. 2. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 1 , wherein the movement of the balls is effected by rotation of an eccentric in the ball casing. 3. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 1, wherein the eccentric wobbles dynamically, that means here along two vectors. 4. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 1 and 2, wherein the drive is effected by a wind-up clockwork spring. 5. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 1 and 2, wherein the drive is battery-driven. 6. Stirring device for kitchen use according to claim 5, wherein a sealing battery housing can be screwed in and out. 7. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 6, wherein the batteries contained therein are rechargeable via an attached plug connection. 8. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 6 and 7, wherein the batteries contained therein are high temperature tolerant rechargeable batteries. 9. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 1, wherein the hemispherical bowls are made of metal, preferably stainless steel. 10. Stirring device for kitchen application according to claim 1 -5, wherein the assembled hemispherical shells have flukes or knobs of elastic material on the outside.
